summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3 regression testing of GPOS by Grahmos. All backend APIs (92/92 tests) and frontend UI/integration tests passed successfully. Phase 3 NEW features validated: Request Hub intake (4 lanes, preview, duplicate detection), case lifecycle (meeting consent gate, contract clause matrix, order->logistics->receive->close, buy/make/repair), override, delegation, flow replay, offline conflict resolution. Phase 2 regression checks confirmed: SoD enforcement, audit chain integrity, approval workflow, state machine, learning loop all still working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/cases/case_founderday/contract - 5 clauses with all statuses (acceptable, deviation, missing, legal_review)
POST /api/approvals/{id}/delegate - delegated to u_executive with expiry
REGRESSION: SoD still enforced (requester self-approve blocked)
REGRESSION: Student learning attestation still supervisor-gated (422)
Request Hub (/request via 'New Request' nav) - 4 lane cards visible
Request Hub - Event lane form: raw_text, title, budget, needed_by fields working
Request Hub - Preview button shows missing_fields and duplicate_suggestions
Request Hub - Submit button creates case and navigates to Decision Room
Flow Ops - Replay button (F09) increments runs and shows toast notification
Decision Room - Case Lifecycle section visible
Decision Room - Meeting tab: propose windows, send buttons with consent
Decision Room - Contract tab: clause matrix with 5 clauses visible
Decision Room - Order & Logistics tab: order handoff section visible
Decision Room - Override tab: reason, policy_id, expiry form visible
Decision Room (case_hvac) - BMR tab: buy/repair/microfactory options visible
Approval Center - Review sheet opens with delegate select and button
Operator Workspace - Offline Conflicts view accessible
REGRESSION: Grahmos Today - KPI tiles, My Queue, Agent Findings visible
REGRESSION: Demo Mode - dialog opens with role list
REGRESSION: Decision Room - Recommendation and Authorized Decision panels visible
REGRESSION: Decision Room - Stage stepper visible

success_percentage.backend: 100% (92/92 tests passed - 56 Phase 2 regression + 36 Phase 3 new)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all Phase 3 features + Phase 2 regression tested successfully)
